client_construction.code: c, err := elasticsearch.NewClient(elasticsearch.Config{Addresses: []string{addr}}); if err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: Index
primary_operations.sdk_call: var buf bytes.Buffer; if err := json.NewEncoder(&buf).Encode(doc); err != nil { return err }; res, err := s.client.Index(s.index, &buf); if err != nil { return err }; defer res.Body.Close(); return nil

primary_operations.name: Query
primary_operations.sdk_call: res, err := s.client.Search(s.client.Search.WithIndex(s.index), s.client.Search.WithQuery(q)); if err != nil { return nil, err }; defer res.Body.Close(); var out []map[string]any; return out, json.NewDecoder(res.Body).Decode(&out)

code_style_notes: Always check res.IsError() — non-2xx HTTP is NOT a Go error in this SDK
Defer res.Body.Close() to release the connection
